text.value: The resource ActorDefinition/actor-consumer could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ActorDefinition/actor-producer could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/obligation|5.2.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)

Constraint failed: sdf-1: 'Element paths must be unique unless the structure is a constraint (derivation = 'constraint' or snapshot.element.select(path).isDistinct())' (defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)
The element sliceName is prohibited on the element EHDSMedicationPrescriptionObligations.prescriptionItem.substitution.allowed[x] in the context of a specialization
